case_for: Cousins has shown flashes of high-end QB1 upside this season, including a 28.6-point explosion and multiple games clearing 17+ points, showing his ceiling remains intact when things click.
case_against: The pregame projection of just 4.9 points suggests a significant injury or role concern (likely a benching or backup situation), and his recent trend of 10.2 and 4.9 points in the last two weeks points to declining performance or diminished snaps.
